arts.ttl: Collymore’s column: Champions League chances for Aston Villa, PSG crying, Man United and Spurs in the Europa League, Newcastle woes for Carabao Cup final, and more
arts.sum: In his exclusive column for CaughtOffside, former Aston Villa and Liverpool forward Stan Collymore discusses some of football’s biggest talking points, including the prospect of a Liverpool-Aston Villa quarter-final clash in the Champions League, Manchester United’s possible “redemption” in the Europa League, the upcoming Carabao Cup final and much more. — Aston Villa were fortunate […] The post Collymore’s column: Champions League chances for Aston Villa, PSG crying, Man United and Spurs in the Europa League, Newcastle woes for Carabao Cup final, and more appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Slot says ‘lucky’ Liverpool earned good fortune at PSG
arts.sum: Arne Slot has said Liverpool deserved their luck at Paris Saint-Germain in midweek given their hard work at the Parc des Princes. Liverpool weathered a storm from the home side to claim a precious first-leg lead in their Champions League tie. arts.ttl: PSG players all say the same thing after dressing room stunned by Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool have one foot in the Champions League quarter-finals after beating PSG in the first leg of their round-of-16 tie, but the Ligue 1 giants are convinced they'll be able to turn it around

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand Explains Silence After Liverpool’s Winning Goal vs PSG
arts.sum: Former Manchester United defender Rio Ferdinand has broken silence after Liverpool fans slammed his silence following their 1-0 Champions League win.

arts.ttl: PSG’s €50M-Rated Loanee Explains Tottenham, Roma Rejection for Juventus

arts.ttl: Barcelona Offer Arsenal, PSG Target New Contract Who Hansi Flick Sees as Key to System
arts.sum: Frenkie de Jong’s future at Barcelona is uncertain as he approaches the final year of his contract. However, the Spanish club wants to keep the midfielder, but only on their terms. arts.ttl: Liverpool Plan Move for Premier League’s Third Top Scorer Under Ideal Conditions Amid PSG Links
arts.sum: The winter transfer window is closed, and for now, Alexander Isak remains with Newcastle United.
